name: opb-curriculum
description: 22-lesson operator curriculum: 26 core skills + 7 chained slash commands + 4 templates. Engineering → productizing → distribution → monetization → leverage, calibrated for solo operators shipping agent-powered products in 2026. The foundation plugin in MStack — start here if you're still building intuition. (The 40-skill GTM analytics pack now lives in its own gtm-analytics plugin.)
